hero.description: Pick your goal first, then choose the path: start from scratch or improve what already exists.

page.highlight: Service structure in two levels: first your goal, then your situation (from scratch or existing project).

cta.title: Not sure which goal fits best?
cta.description: I can help you choose the most profitable path based on timeline, budget, and current setup.

objectivePage.scenariosSubtitle: Each goal includes one path for new projects and one for existing projects.
objectivePage.bottomDescription: Go back and review other paths before booking your consultation.

presenciaImpacto.title: I just want to be visible (Presence and Impact)
presenciaImpacto.subtitle: Get online fast to capture leads and communicate your offer clearly.
presenciaImpacto.description: Best for businesses that need visibility and trust without unnecessary technical complexity.

autogestionContenido.title: I need to manage my own content

ecommerce.title: I want to sell products 24/7
ecommerce.subtitle: Collect payments online, manage orders, and reduce checkout friction.
ecommerce.description: Focused on conversion, stability, and operations for stores that want sustainable growth.

automatizacionInterna.title: Everything is manual and chaotic
automatizacionInterna.subtitle: Automate operations and recover time with measurable workflows.
automatizacionInterna.description: For teams running on spreadsheets and manual tasks that slow down growth.

fromScratch.label: From scratch
fromScratch.title: Build from scratch
fromScratch.description: We design the solution from day one with a clean architecture aligned with your goals.

existingProject.label: Existing project
existingProject.title: Improve what you already have
existingProject.description: We audit your current setup, fix bottlenecks, and bring it up to modern standards.

serviceDetail.hookTitle: What do you get from this path?

fromScratch.title: Fast presence website with Next.js + Vercel
fromScratch.subtitle: Landing page or corporate site without backend overhead.
fromScratch.description: I build a high-speed website to capture leads and communicate your service with strong SEO foundations.
fromScratch.longDescription: If your priority is to launch quickly and look professional, this path gives you a modern lightweight site ready to rank from day one.
fromScratch.problem: You need immediate digital presence without a heavy or expensive platform.
fromScratch.solution: Next.js implementation on Vercel, optimized for performance, technical SEO, and measurement.
fromScratch.implementation: Landing pages, corporate websites, QR menus, and initial setup with Search Console and Google Maps.
fromScratch.hook: You get online with a site that loads in milliseconds and builds trust on the first visit.

existingProject.title: Existing website rescue and optimization
existingProject.subtitle: Refactor your current site for design quality, speed, and SEO.
existingProject.description: I take your existing site and turn it into a clearer, faster, and conversion-oriented asset.
existingProject.longDescription: If your site looks outdated, loads slowly, or does not convert, this path prioritizes the highest-impact fixes without rebuilding everything.
existingProject.problem: Your current site is losing opportunities due to poor UX, low speed, or technical errors.
existingProject.solution: Full audit, UI/UX redesign, technical SEO fixes, and Core Web Vitals improvements.
existingProject.implementation: Works with Wix, legacy HTML, or heavy builders through staged improvements.
existingProject.hook: Without throwing away your current project, you gain performance, clarity, and better search visibility.
existingProject.cta: I want to improve my site

fromScratch.title: Self-managed content site from scratch
fromScratch.subtitle: Clean WordPress or dynamic Next.js with custom admin panel.
fromScratch.description: You get a simple content workflow so your team can publish without breaking layout or structure.
fromScratch.longDescription: Perfect for real-estate pages, catalogs, and blogs where content changes often and operational autonomy is critical.
fromScratch.problem: Every small content update depends on technical support and slows down execution.
fromScratch.solution: I implement a structured CMS and a safe editorial workflow.
fromScratch.implementation: Admin configuration, content models, stable templates, and automatic indexing setup.
fromScratch.hook: Your team publishes in minutes and each new page goes live with SEO-ready structure.

existingProject.title: Cleanup and reorganization of existing CMS
existingProject.subtitle: Fix WordPress chaos or migrate when needed.
existingProject.description: I turn a hard-to-manage panel into a practical tool your team can use confidently.
existingProject.longDescription: When WordPress gets overloaded with plugins, every change becomes risky. This path restores stability and simplifies operations.
existingProject.problem: Updating content is slow, fragile, and requires advanced technical knowledge.
existingProject.solution: Technical cleanup, database optimization, ACF admin redesign, and migration plan when needed.
existingProject.implementation: Remove unnecessary dependencies, standardize content structure, and document workflows.
existingProject.hook: Your CMS stops being a blocker and becomes a reliable channel for growth.
existingProject.cta: I want to fix my CMS

fromScratch.title: Shopify store from scratch
fromScratch.subtitle: Ecommerce ready to sell with conversion-focused setup.
fromScratch.description: I launch your Shopify store with clean structure, clear checkout, and tracking on day one.
fromScratch.longDescription: If you are starting online sales, this path helps you launch quickly with a reliable technical foundation for growth.
fromScratch.problem: You need 24/7 online sales without infrastructure headaches.
fromScratch.solution: Full Shopify implementation including catalog, payments, shipping, and analytics.
fromScratch.implementation: Store setup, product page optimization, and Google tools integration.
fromScratch.hook: You focus on products and logistics while the technical side remains stable and scalable.
fromScratch.cta: I want to launch my store

existingProject.title: Optimize or migrate your existing ecommerce
existingProject.subtitle: Recover sales in Shopify or migrate from unstable platforms.
existingProject.description: I reduce checkout friction and improve performance to lower cart abandonment.
existingProject.longDescription: If your store crashes, loads slowly, or checkout blocks customers, this path fixes your commercial core.
existingProject.problem: You are losing revenue due to technical failures, low speed, or unnecessary checkout steps.
existingProject.solution: Shopify optimization, local payment integrations, and controlled migration from WooCommerce or PrestaShop.
existingProject.implementation: Conversion audit, checkout simplification, app optimization, and speed improvements.
existingProject.hook: With less purchase friction and better stability, your current traffic converts better.
existingProject.cta: I want to optimize my store

fromScratch.title: Custom internal software from scratch
fromScratch.subtitle: Digitize operations and remove repetitive manual tasks.
fromScratch.description: I build internal systems aligned with your real workflow so your team can execute faster.
fromScratch.longDescription: When operations depend on spreadsheets and disconnected chats, growth becomes painful. This path creates central control and traceability.
fromScratch.problem: Your team loses hours on manual work and lacks reliable metrics for decisions.
fromScratch.solution: Custom software modules aligned with your operational process and KPIs.
fromScratch.implementation: Rapid prototyping, role-based dashboards, and key reports for daily management.
fromScratch.hook: Tasks that currently take hours become repeatable workflows solved in minutes.

existingProject.title: Integrate and evolve your current systems
existingProject.subtitle: Connect your tools without replacing everything at once.
existingProject.description: I add automation on top of your current stack to reduce duplicate work and manual errors.
existingProject.longDescription: If you already have ERP, billing, or internal software, this path protects that investment while adding automation progressively.
existingProject.problem: Your systems are disconnected, so teams repeat tasks across multiple tools.
existingProject.solution: API integrations, legacy module refactor, and progressive replacement of obsolete parts.
existingProject.implementation: Process mapping, automated flow design, and low-risk phased delivery.
existingProject.hook: Without a traumatic migration, your team gains speed, control, and fewer human errors.
existingProject.cta: I want to connect my systems

LocaleSuggestion.title: Prefer another language?
LocaleSuggestion.description: We can show this page in {language}.

profile.text: Professional focused on the development of functional, responsive web interfaces aligned with user requirements. Experience in implementing front-end solutions applying development best practices, code maintenance, and component optimization. Focus on building clear, efficient, and easy-to-use digital products.

bullets.b1: Developed an inspection and certification management system for fuel stations (EDS), optimizing workflows and process traceability.
bullets.b2: Implemented certificate validation through QR codes, speeding up verification and increasing trust in provided services.
bullets.b3: Integrated Google Sheets as an intermediate database, enabling analysis and report tracking for more effective decision-making.
bullets.b4: Designed a PDF template system for certificates, ensuring institutional consistency and improving presentation to clients and regulators.

bullets.b1: Built responsive interfaces with React and Tailwind CSS, improving interaction and satisfaction for end users.
bullets.b2: Developed REST API integrations and optimized application performance, contributing to operational continuity and project scalability for clients.

bullets.b1: Develop and maintain websites and small web apps for diverse clients.
bullets.b2: Deploy projects to production using cPanel and Vercel, ensuring availability and stability.
bullets.b3: Configure custom domains to improve clients' digital presence.
bullets.b4: Apply basic SEO and performance optimization to improve visibility and efficiency.
bullets.b5: Prepare technical documentation and provide client support in web environments, making delivered solutions easier to manage and use.

certificates.name: EDS Certificate System
certificates.description: Web platform for issuing, managing, and validating inspection certificates, optimizing internal processes and strengthening the company's reputation with clients and regulators. Includes an admin panel and a public verification portal for transparent access.

iso.name: ISO 17020 Management Portal
iso.description: Documentation and quality control system for inspection bodies, designed to improve operational efficiency and regulatory compliance while supporting excellence and differentiation in the sector.

items.i5: Manejo de Datos, Estructuras y Funciones

home.title: danidevcol | Web Development in Colombia and Global Optimization
home.description: Freelance web developer in Colombia specialized in development, redesign, and web optimization for global businesses. Professional multilingual solutions to strengthen your digital presence.

services.title: Web Services - Development, SEO & Optimization | DaniDevCol
services.description: Responsive web design, Next.js development, SEO optimization, and digital consulting. Professional solutions for global businesses from Colombia. Boost your online presence.

portfolio.title: Web Portfolio - Next.js & React Projects | DaniDevCol
portfolio.description: Success cases in web development: Somos Criteria, Oasix, CertiXion. Portfolio with 6+ projects. Measurable results in UX, performance, and conversions.

curriculum.title: Daniel Pérez Guzman - Full Stack Developer | danidevcol
curriculum.description: CV of Daniel Pérez: Full Stack Developer with 3+ years in Next.js, React, TypeScript. Expert in web optimization, project management, and automation. Colombia-based.

somosCriteria.name: Somos Criteria
somosCriteria.description: Political consulting focused on strategy and digital presence.
somosCriteria.fullDescription: Corporate website for Somos Criteria, a political consulting firm. The project focused on presenting services, professional authority, and value proposition with a clear structure and modern experience.

womenOasix.name: Women Oasix
womenOasix.description: Freelancer profile website for a personal client brand.
womenOasix.fullDescription: Freelancer profile website developed for a client, focused on strengthening her personal brand, showcasing services, and enabling business contact with a clean and professional visual experience.

raicesDeOro.name: Raices de Oro
raicesDeOro.description: University entrepreneurship project with product and identity focus.
raicesDeOro.fullDescription: Landing page for a university entrepreneurship initiative focused on communicating project story, product value, and brand identity. The site was built with a clear visual narrative and simple navigation.

certixion.name: CertiXion
certixion.description: Application for ISO 17020 management with cloud integrations.
certixion.fullDescription: Application built with Next.js and Firebase to manage ISO 17020 related processes. It includes Google Drive integration for document centralization, traceability, and operational efficiency.

constructora0312.name: Constructora 0312
constructora0312.description: Corporate website for construction sector services.
constructora0312.fullDescription: Website project for Constructora 0312 focused on presenting company experience, service lines, and contact channels. The content architecture was designed for commercial clarity and lead capture.
constructora0312.technologies: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Responsive Design

servicrep.name: Servicrep
servicrep.description: Inspection organization with institutional digital presence.
servicrep.fullDescription: Website for Servicrep, an inspection organization, focused on presenting service scope, technical trust, and support channels. The experience prioritizes clear information and conversion.
